name: Fist Checkpoint Warden
visual_description: A stern human soldier in chain mail and splint armor stands at a checkpoint, hand raised in a commanding halt gesture. A large ceremonial revolver-style pistol holstered at their hip. Rigid posture, authoritarian bearing. Papers and documents scattered on a desk behind them. Checkpoint barrier visible in background.
full_prompt: A stern human soldier in chain mail and splint armor stands at a checkpoint, hand raised in a commanding halt gesture. A large ceremonial revolver-style pistol holstered at their hip. Rigid posture, authoritarian bearing. Papers and documents scattered on a desk behind them. Checkpoint barrier visible in background.. Stylized digital illustration, structured balanced composition, warm sandstone and ivory tones, golden-hour lighting with long shadows, post-apocalyptic science-fantasy setting.
